return(function(Z,A,o,E,P,r,x,d,k,q,C,w,R,g,N,u,t,f,l,W,K,B,h)u,h,R,f,B,w,d,q,t,K,W,l,g,k,C,N=483711+-483711,function(Z,X)local A=t(X)local o=function(o,E,P,r)return q(Z,{o;E;P,r},X,A)end return o X=-68442-(-68443),#Z,689664+-689663 do C[Z[X]]=C[Z[X]]+(262904-262903)end if o then local q=o(true)local A=P(q)A[X(130747+-77670)],A[X(739980+-686679)],A[X(-293517-(-346604))]=Z,W,function()return
